name: wealth-management
description: Wealth management, financial planning, and investment analytics. Compounds on finance-substrate for tax-optimized wealth building with descriptive, predictive, and prescriptive analytics.

mode.description: Skill mode: summary (portfolio health), project (compound growth), goal (target planning), allocation (asset mix), rebalance (trades), scenario (Monte Carlo), optimize (tax-efficient strategy)

years.description: Projection horizon in years (for project/goal/scenario modes)

target_amount_usd.description: Goal target amount in USD (for goal mode)

target_amount_cop.description: Goal target amount in COP (for goal mode)

target_date.description: Goal target date YYYY-MM-DD (for goal mode)

risk_profile.description: Risk tolerance for allocation and projection assumptions

drift_threshold.description: Rebalancing trigger: % absolute deviation from target (for rebalance mode)

simulations.description: Number of Monte Carlo simulations (for scenario mode)

json.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable
